title: Goat Expansion
description: Makes goats more useful in the game!
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4591cd35713c2bc560a2c64a646b912fe0e72d83.png)

![book](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0800da8b14afc5b3e1af7479dfef54c45e3f26cb.png)

**Goat Expansion makes goats much more useful and fun in Minecraft! This mod introduces new blocks, items, and mechanics centered around goats, giving you more reasons to interact with them.**

## ✨ **Features**

### 🐏 **Ram Block**

A special block that interacts with pistons to break other blocks, simulating a battering ram.


![Ram Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/121fde082da3e4492455088e2e0c04cb6f329332.png)

### 🍖 **New Food Items**

-Goat Ham: New food items—raw and cooked goat ham-dropped from goats.

![ASD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/823a446f834317e1c32445b404f49a5ac93cb7e5.png)

-Goat Milk Bucket: Milk goats to get a unique goat milk bucket. When you drink it, it removes your most recent status effect (unlike regular milk, which removes all effects).


### 🏆**New Advancement**

![horns collector](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fd5b63ee03819bf7d2324b5820cc8838d17db32.png)
